title: Creamy Confit Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A mustardy, dense, and flavorful Saudi Arabian dish featuring confit tomatoes and Dutch stroop, perfect for a brunch mood, and is satvik friendly.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into 2 inch pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the mustard seeds, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the Dutch stroop and cook for 1 minute.
Add the confit tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the coconut cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve over rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
